sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_ngram (id Int32, str_col String, num_col UInt8);
SELECT ngramMinHashUTF8(str_col, 3, 6) AS hashes FROM test_ngram WHERE num_col = 1;
SELECT (SELECT ngramMinHashUTF8(str_col, 5, 8) FROM test_ngram WHERE id = 1) AS minimum_hash FROM test_ngram;
SELECT id, str_col, ngramMinHashUTF8(str_col, 4, 6) AS hashes FROM test_ngram GROUP BY id, str_col HAVING hashes.1 IS NOT NULL;
WITH (SELECT ngramMinHashUTF8('SampleText', 2, 5)) AS sample_hashes SELECT (sample_hashes.1, sample_hashes.2, ngramMinHashUTF8(str_col, 10, 15)) FROM test_ngram;
SELECT str_col FROM test_ngram WHERE ngramMinHashUTF8(CAST(num_col AS String), 3, 6).1 IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_join AS SELECT ngramMinHashUTF8(str_col, 3, 6) AS hashes FROM test_ngram;
SELECT hashes FROM (SELECT ngramMinHashUTF8(str_col, 3, 6) AS hashes FROM test_ngram WHERE NOT str_col = '') AS derived_table JOIN test_join ON derived_table.hashes.1 = test_join.hashes;
